    • testEligibleStudent

      @Test void testEligibleStudent() throws Exception
      Positive prototype test used for documentation screenshots. A student with three unique recipients should be grading-eligible.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • testIneligibleStudent

      @Test void testIneligibleStudent() throws Exception
      Negative/boundary prototype test used for documentation screenshots. Repeated replies to one recipient must not count as multiple unique recipients.
      Throws:
      Exception
